title: Lead Frontend Developer at Flipkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Flipkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Faridabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Capital India:
Flipkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Capital India!
